responsibilities: • deliver lectures in accounting, finance, taxation, and auditing   • design curriculum, course material, and assessment methods   • conduct exams, evaluations, and academic m entoring   • participate in research, publications, and academic development   • guide student projects and internships   • engage in academic committees and institutional activities
qualifications: • ca / mba / phd in finance or accounting   • strong academic orien tation and communication skills   • research and teaching aptitude
